name: llm-fallback-proxy
description: OpenAI-compatible LLM API proxy with model fallback/cascade capabilities

scripts.smoke: curl -s http://localhost:8000/v1/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-api-key: dummy-token" -H "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" -d '{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","max_tokens":50,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Say hello in exactly 3 words"}]}'
